steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says tribal economic activity totaled over 7.3 billion dollars and ranked it 'above ______.' The blank must correctly rank 7.3 billion dollars against the three table industries: accommodation/food services (5.2 billion dollars), retail (10.7 billion dollars), and health care (13.7 billion dollars).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "both accommodation/food services and retail but below health care.": 7.3 billion dollars is above accommodation/food services (5.2B) but below retail (10.7B), not above it. This ranking is wrong. ✗
  • "accommodation/food services but below both health care and retail.": 7.3B exceeds 5.2B (accommodation/food services) and falls below 10.7B (retail) and 13.7B (health care). This ranking is accurate. ✓
  • "health care, retail, and accommodation/food services.": This claims 7.3B outranks all three industries, including health care (13.7B) and retail (10.7B). Both figures exceed 7.3B, so this is wrong. ✗
  • "accommodation/food services and nearly equal to health care and retail.": 7.3B is not close to health care (13.7B) or retail (10.7B) — it is 3.4B and 6.4B below those figures respectively. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
